/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -pedantic -Wno-long-long -Wall -Wextra -Wcast-align -Wcast-qual -Wformat -Wwrite-strings -Wconversion  -O3 -DNDEBUG  -shared -Wl,-soname,libmaster_board_sdk.so -o libmaster_board_sdk.so CMakeFiles/master_board_sdk.dir/src/ETHERNET_types.cpp.o CMakeFiles/master_board_sdk.dir/src/Link_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/master_board_sdk.dir/src/master_board_interface.cpp.o CMakeFiles/master_board_sdk.dir/src/motor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/master_board_sdk.dir/src/motor_driver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/master_board_sdk.dir/src/ESPNOW_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/master_board_sdk.dir/src/ESPNOW_types.cpp.o  -lpthread
